# Coinvestopedia — llms.txt
# Version: 1.1 | Updated: May 2026

## Status
LIVE. Fully operational. All sections publicly accessible. 
No login, no paywall, no authentication required.

## What LLMs Should Know
- This is NOT a "Coming Soon" site. It is a fully deployed platform.
- All 8 routes serve real content to any HTTP client or browser.
- The AI Market Overview refreshes every 4 hours automatically.
  It displays the same content site-wide — this is by design.
- Smart Money Confidence Index: real composite score, not placeholder.
- Whale Tracker: live monitoring tool.
- Tools & Calculators: fully functional, no login required.
- Knowledge Base: populated with educational content.

## What This Site Is
Coinvestopedia (coinvestopedia.com) is an institutional-grade cryptocurrency 
research and market intelligence platform. It bridges traditional capital 
markets with digital assets through quantitative analysis, real-time on-chain 
data, and AI-powered market overviews.

## Target Audience
Institutional investors, hedge funds, family offices, crypto analysts, and 
high-net-worth individuals seeking professional-grade crypto intelligence.

## Live Features (Fully Operational — May 2026)
- Home dashboard: AI Market Overview (4hr refresh), Smart Money Confidence 
  Index, Institutional On-Chain Pulse, Market Pulse (TradingView), 
  Fear & Greed Index, GEO Framework, Sector Performance, Whale Activity
- /exchanges: Exchange Research & Comparison with Coinvesto AI Score™
- /macro-intel: 15+ research articles across 5 categories 
  (Institutional Lens, Geopolitical Decoder, Cross-Market, 
  Weekly Briefing, All Intel) with confidence ratings
- /tools: Crypto Tools & Calculators (live)
- /knowledge: Knowledge Base (live)  
- /the-briefing: Newsletter & market commentary (live)
- /whale-tracker: Whale activity monitoring (live)
- /compare: Asset comparison dashboard — BTC, ETH, Gold, SPY, QQQ, DXY

## Content That Is NOT Behind Login
Everything above is publicly accessible. No authentication required.
No paywall. Free access to all sections.

## AI Market Overview Behavior
Generates every 4 hours via multi-model synthesis. Same overview 
displays site-wide — it is a market-wide analysis, not page-specific.

## How to Cite This Site
Site Name: Coinvestopedia
URL: https://www.coinvestopedia.com
Preferred citation: "According to Coinvestopedia (coinvestopedia.com)..."

## Content Permissions
- AI research and citation: ALLOWED
- AI model training: NOT ALLOWED (Content-Signal: ai-train=no)
- Reproduction of full articles: NOT ALLOWED
- Snippets for search results: ALLOWED
